name: Brunswick Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 can (15 oz.) lima beans, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chicken and water in a Dutch oven; bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 1 1/2 to 2 hours or until chicken is tender. Remove chicken and debone; cube chicken and return to broth.
3. Add potatoes, beans, onions, and seasonings. Simmer for 30 minutes or until potatoes are tender.
4. Stir in remaining ingredients. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes or until slightly thickened. Yield: 6 servings.
